svg.title: Figure 4.24: Workflow of the AI Assistant Module in FinWise
svg.desc: A vertical workflow diagram showing the flow from user chat input to backend handling, privacy redaction, planner LLM, deterministic execution, narrator LLM, fallback behavior, and structured assistant response in the FinWise interface.
svg.text: Workflow of the AI Assistant Module in FinWise
Planner-executor-narrator flow with privacy controls and structured UI output
1. User Query in Assistant UI
User enters a financial question and may choose a date range or selected goal.
2. Backend Receives Request
The backend validates the request and loads recent chat context if needed.
3. Privacy Redaction and Context Minimization
Sensitive items such as emails, phone numbers, and account-like strings are redacted.
4. Planner LLM
Model used: GPT-5 mini
Returns a strict JSON plan with intent, sub-intent, horizon, scenario,
goal usage, and whether clarification is required.
5. Deterministic Backend Executor
The backend performs the actual financial work instead of letting the LLM invent numbers.
It retrieves Firestore data, computes descriptive summaries, runs scenario logic,
and calls the goal forecasting service when predictive outputs are required.
Sources used here include transactions, goals, recent chat context,
and the LightGBM goal projection models.
6. Narrator LLM
Model used: GPT-5 mini
Rewrites the deterministic result into plain-language explanation for the user.
If narration fails, the system falls back to the deterministic response.
7. Structured Assistant Response Returned to UI
The interface shows a summary, explanation panel, evidence, confidence,
and follow-up suggestions, and stores the exchange in chat history.
